spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Update the Java version property from 1.8 to 17 to target the new JDK.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: The project must compile and run on Java 17; keeping 1.8 may cause build failures or incorrect bytecode generation depending on the build plugin configuration.

spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade the Spring Boot parent version from 1.4.0.RELEASE to 3.3.13 to align with Java 17 requirements.
spring-boot-rest-services/pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 1.4 is incompatible with Java 17 (uses removed APIs like javax.servlet, old module system issues); the build will fail or runtime will crash without this upgrade.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Migrate JPA entity annotations from javax.persistence to jakarta.persistence namespace.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: javax.persistence package is removed in Jakarta EE 9+ (Spring Boot 3), causing compile errors for missing classes.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Replace deprecated WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter with lambda DSL configuration required by Spring Security 6.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: WebSecurityConfigurerAdapter is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors if the class extends it.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Update HttpSecurity configuration to use lambda DSL and requestMatchers instead of deprecated antMatchers.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: antMatchers is removed in Spring Security 6, causing compilation errors; the old fluent API style is no longer supported.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.general_idea: Add import for Customizer.withDefaults used in the new security configuration.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/main/java/.why_exists: The new configuration uses withDefaults() which requires this static import to compile.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Migrate JUnit 4 assertions to JUnit 5 Jupiter assertions.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: JUnit 4 classes are not part of the JUnit 5 Jupiter API; tests using JUnit 4 annotations/assertions will fail to compile or run if the runner is not configured, and the migration target is JUnit 5.
JUnit 4 @Before is not recognized by the JUnit 5 engine; the method will not be executed as a lifecycle callback without the correct JUnit 5 annotation.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Remove JUnit 4 runner and replace with JUnit 5 compatible setup.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x / JUnit 5 does not use @RunWith(SpringRunner.class); this annotation is ignored or causes errors in a pure JUnit 5 environment.

spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.general_idea: Update Spring Boot test port annotation package for Spring Boot 3.x.
spring-boot-rest-services/src/test/java/.why_exists: The class LocalServerPort moved from org.springframework.boot.context.embedded to org.springframework.boot.test.web.server in Spring Boot 3.x; the old import causes a compile error.
